cleavage agent: glutathione S-transferase-tagged rhinovirus 3C protease to remove the hexahistidine tag
collision energy: Data were collected at three wavelengths (1.2548 (9880.9), 1.2552 (9877.4) and 1.2536 Å (9890.0 eV) for peak, inflection and high-energy remote, respectively)
enrichment method: purified using batch binding of clarified cell lysate to Ni2+-NTA
labeling: using a crosslinking and mass spectrometry approach
reduction reagent: 1 mM dithiothreitol in the presence of glutathione S-transferase-tagged rhinovirus 3C protease
reduction concentration: 1 mM dithiothreitol in the presence of glutathione S-transferase-tagged rhinovirus 3C protease
